summary: auth status reports authenticated when an env-var token is set.
reason: newAuthStatusCmd derived `authed` from `cfg.AccessToken != ""` only, but Config.AuthHeader() also succeeds when OuraOauth2 (the OURA_OAUTH2 env var) or AuthHeaderVal is set. A user authenticating via OURA_OAUTH2 saw a false 'Not authenticated' and `{"authenticated": false}` while every API call succeeded. Switched the check to `cfg.AuthHeader() != ""` so status matches the actual auth resolution. Generator-shaped gap in the OAuth status template.
